---
title: "TCBL Models — Interactive Mind Map"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    minimal: true
---

::: {.column-page}

```{=html}
<style>
  body { margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  #mindmap-container { 
    width: 100vw; 
    height: 85vh; 
  }
  .controls {
    padding: 10px 20px;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .controls button, .controls .lang-btn {
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: white;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  .controls button:hover, .controls .lang-btn:hover { background: #e8e8e8; }
  .controls .lang-btn.active { 
    background: #0066cc; 
    color: white; 
    border-color: #0066cc; 
  }
  .back-link { 
    margin-left: auto; 
    color: #0066cc; 
    text-decoration: none; 
  }
  .lang-group {
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
    margin-left: 20px;
  }
</style>

<div class="controls">
  <strong id="map-title">TCBL Model Taxonomy</strong>
  <button onclick="mm.fit()">🔄 Fit</button>
  <button onclick="mm.rescale(1.25)">➕ Zoom In</button>
  <button onclick="mm.rescale(0.8)">➖ Zoom Out</button>
  <div class="lang-group">
    <button class="lang-btn active" id="btn-en" onclick="switchLang('en')">English</button>
    <button class="lang-btn" id="btn-zh" onclick="switchLang('zh')">中文</button>
  </div>
  <a href="index.html" class="back-link" id="back-link">← Back to Article</a>
</div>

<svg id="mindmap-container"></svg>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/markmap-view@0.17"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/markmap-lib@0.17"></script>

<script>
const mdEn = `
# TCBL Modeling

## 1. Introduction
### 1.1 Performance-based wind engineering (PBWE)
### 1.2 Multi-scale simulation of TCs
### 1.3 Definition of TCBL
### 1.4 Recent research on TCBL characteristics
### 1.5 Introduction to TCBL modeling
### 1.6 Organization of this paper

## 2. Full-physics TCBL Models
### 2.1 WRF (Weather Research & Forecasting)
#### 2.1.1 WRF-ARW (Advanced Research WRF)
- Turbulence parameterizations (YSU, MYJ)
- Bottom boundary conditions
- Initial conditions
- Data assimilation
- Ensemble prediction
#### 2.1.2 HWRF (Hurricane WRF)
#### 2.1.3 HWCM (Hybrid WRF Cyclone Model)
### 2.2 Other Models
- GFS, GFDL, CM1/LES, COAMPS

## 3. Diagnostic Models
### 3.1 Axisymmetric Models
#### Hybrid models (Shapiro 1983)
#### Height-averaged models (Chow 1971)
#### Nonlinear analytical (Kuo 1982)
#### Linear analytical (Kepert 2001)
### 3.2 Parametric Models (I): Methods
#### Gradient pressure/wind profile models
- Axisymmetric: Holland (1980), Willoughby (2006), Emanuel (2004)
- Asymmetric: Xie et al. (2006), Georgiou (1985)
#### TC track models
- Circular sub-region method
- Full-track method (Vickery et al. 2000)
#### Vertical wind profile models
- Surface Wind Reduction Factor (SWRF)
- TCBL profile models
### 3.3 Parametric Models (II): Analytical Linear
#### K01 model (Kepert 2001)
#### Axisymmetric model accounting for asymmetry (Meng et al. 1995)
#### Recent developments
### 3.4 Simulation-based (I): 2D-slab
- Height-averaged primitive equations
- Exploring TC physics
- Surrogates for PBWE
- Applications
### 3.5 Simulation-based (II): 2D Hybrid
- Prescribed vertical profiles
### 3.6 Simulation-based (III): **3D Nonlinear** ⭐
#### KW01 model (Kepert & Wang 2001)
#### Y08 model (Yoshizumi 2008)
#### Linearization for efficiency
#### Validation
#### Physics
- Turbulence closure (M-Y, Louis)
- Vertical advection
- Landfall & land-sea contrast
- Thermodynamics
- TC evolution
- Micro-meteorological phenomena
#### Comparison to other models
- vs 2D-slab, Parametric, Full-physics (CM1, WRF-ARW)
#### Applications

## 4. Data-driven Methods
### Modifying radial profiles
### Introducing additional asymmetries
### POD-based models

## 5. NatHaz Investigation
### Motivation
- KW01 most rigorous but not yet adopted in PBWE
- Current PBWE relies on simplified 2D-slab & parametric models
### Objectives
- (1) Evaluate model sensitivity across TC parameter ranges
- (2) Construct benchmark dataset (692 sorties) for validation
- (3) Develop hierarchy of linear models as fast approximations
- (4) Investigate land-sea roughness contrast for landfalling TCs
### Key findings
- 692-sortie benchmark: Flight+ input with surface/SFMR/H*Wind output
- Factor influence typically within 22%, concentrated near RMW
- Height-resolving column model: reasonable approximation under certain conditions
- Land-sea roughness: ~22% overall, ~14% surface over-ocean wind change

## 6. Concluding Remarks
### (1) Incorporate 3D nonlinear model into PBWE
- Develop statistical models for uncertainty/sensitivity
- Evaluate alternative radial profiles beyond Holland
- Benchmark all diagnostic models via idealized & practical simulations
- Statistical model for land-sea roughness asymmetry
### (2) Microscale phenomena from TCBL outputs
- Rainbands, tornado-scale vortices, nonstationary turbulence
- Uncertainty propagation from mesoscale to microscale
### (3) Influence of TCBL model uncertainty on PBWE metrics
- Annual maximum wind speeds, loss ratios
### (4) Continued benchmark dataset development
- Additional measurements (SAR, SMAP, MTCSWA)
- Improved dropsonde calibration
### (5) Data-driven model development
- ML-based asymmetry modeling
- Multi-fidelity modeling with benchmark data
- Surrogates from 3D nonlinear simulations
`;

const mdZh = `
# TCBL建模

## 1. 引言
### 1.1 基于性能的风工程（PBWE）
### 1.2 台风的多尺度模拟
### 1.3 TCBL的定义
### 1.4 TCBL特征的近期研究
### 1.5 TCBL建模概述
### 1.6 本文的组织结构

## 2. 全物理TCBL模型
### 2.1 天气研究与预报模型（WRF）
#### 2.1.1 WRF-ARW
- 湍流参数化（YSU、MYJ）
- 下垫面条件
- 初始条件
- 资料同化
- 集合预报
#### 2.1.2 HWRF
#### 2.1.3 HWCM（混合WRF气旋模型）
### 2.2 其他模型
- GFS、GFDL、CM1/LES、COAMPS

## 3. 诊断模型
### 3.1 轴对称模型
#### 混合模型（Shapiro 1983）
#### 高度平均模型（Chow 1971）
#### 非线性解析模型（Kuo 1982）
#### 线性解析模型（Kepert 2001）
### 3.2 参数化模型（I）：方法
#### 梯度气压/风剖面模型
- 轴对称：Holland (1980)、Willoughby (2006)、Emanuel (2004)
- 非对称：Xie et al. (2006)、Georgiou (1985)
#### 台风路径模型
- 单位圆法
- 全路径法（Vickery et al. 2000）
#### 垂直风剖面模型
- 近地面风速折减因子（SWRF）
- TCBL剖面模型
### 3.3 参数化模型（II）：解析线性模型
#### K01模型（Kepert 2001）
#### 考虑不对称性的轴对称模型（Meng et al. 1995）
#### 近期进展
### 3.4 模拟型模型（I）：二维平板模型
- 高度平均原始方程
- 探索台风物理机制
- PBWE替代模型
- 应用
### 3.5 模拟型模型（II）：二维混合模型
- 预设垂直剖面
### 3.6 模拟型模型（III）：**三维非线性模型** ⭐
#### KW01模型（Kepert & Wang 2001）
#### Y08模型（Yoshizumi 2008）
#### 线性化加速
#### 验证
#### 物理机制
- 湍流闭合（M-Y、Louis）
- 垂直平流
- 登陆与海陆对比
- 热力学
- 台风演变
- 微气象现象
#### 与其他模型的对比
- 与二维平板、参数化、全物理模型（CM1、WRF-ARW）
#### 应用

## 4. 数据驱动方法
### 修正径向剖面
### 引入额外不对称性
### 基于正交分解（POD）的模型

## 5. NatHaz实验室的系统性研究
### 研究动机
- KW01为最严谨的诊断模型，但尚未应用于PBWE
- 当前PBWE依赖简化的二维平板和参数化模型
### 研究目标
- (1) 评估模型对各台风参数范围的敏感性
- (2) 构建基准数据集（692架次）用于验证
- (3) 发展线性模型层级体系作为快速近似
- (4) 研究登陆台风的海陆粗糙度对比效应
### 主要发现
- 692架次基准数据集：Flight+输入，地面站/SFMR/H*Wind输出
- 各因素影响通常在22%以内，集中于RMW附近
- 高度分辨柱模型：特定条件下可作为合理近似
- 海陆粗糙度对比：整体风速变化约22%，洋面近地风速变化约14%

## 6. 结论与展望
### (1) 将三维非线性模型引入PBWE
- 建立基于台风参数的不确定性/敏感性统计模型
- 评估Holland之外的替代径向剖面
- 通过理想化与实际模拟对所有诊断模型进行基准测试
- 建立海陆粗糙度不对称性统计模型
### (2) 基于TCBL输出的微尺度现象研究
- 雨带、龙卷尺度涡旋、非平稳湍流
- 从中尺度到微尺度的不确定性传播
### (3) TCBL模型不确定性对PBWE指标的影响
- 年最大风速、损失比
### (4) 持续完善基准数据集
- 新增观测手段（SAR、SMAP、MTCSWA）
- 改进探空资料标定
### (5) 数据驱动模型开发
- 基于机器学习的不对称性建模
- 结合基准数据的多保真度建模
- 基于三维非线性模拟的替代模型
`;

let currentLang = 'en';
let mm;

function renderMap(md) {
  const svg = document.getElementById('mindmap-container');
  svg.innerHTML = '';
  const { Transformer } = window.markmap;
  const transformer = new Transformer();
  const { root } = transformer.transform(md);
  const { Markmap } = window.markmap;
  mm = Markmap.create('#mindmap-container', {
    autoFit: true,
    duration: 500,
    maxWidth: 300,
    color: (node) => {
      const depth = node.state?.depth || 0;
      const colors = ['#003366', '#0066cc', '#3399ff', '#66b3ff', '#99ccff', '#cce5ff'];
      return colors[Math.min(depth, colors.length - 1)];
    }
  }, root);
  setTimeout(() => mm.fit(), 300);
}

function switchLang(lang) {
  currentLang = lang;
  document.getElementById('btn-en').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'en');
  document.getElementById('btn-zh').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'zh');
  document.getElementById('map-title').textContent = lang === 'en' ? 'TCBL Model Taxonomy' : 'TCBL模型分类体系';
  const backLink = document.getElementById('back-link');
  if (lang === 'en') {
    backLink.textContent = '← Back to Article';
    backLink.href = 'index.html';
  } else {
    backLink.textContent = '← 返回文章';
    backLink.href = 'index-zh.html';
  }
  renderMap(lang === 'en' ? mdEn : mdZh);
}

renderMap(mdEn);
</script>
```

:::
